title: Goal Update
description: A progress update on a goal within the big-picture coordination loop. Goal updates are the recurring signal that keeps plans connected to progress -- written narratives that give everyone the context they need.

goal_id.description: ID of the goal this update is for.

actor_id.description: ID of the person or agent providing this update.

actor_type.description: Whether the actor is a person or an agent.

status.description: Goal status as of this update.

content.description: Narrative update -- the written context about where things stand and why. Writing it down clarifies thinking, makes updates digestible, and creates a searchable record.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this update was published (ISO 8601).
